# 8 Best AI Tools for Freelancers in 2026 — Scale Your Solo Business

Freelancers, time is your most valuable asset! Let AI help you do more in less time!

For more tools, check out our [[link:/category/Productivity|Productivity category]]!

---

## Quick Comparison Table

| Tool | Best For | Pricing | Time Saved |
|------|-----------|---------|------------|
| [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] | Writing client work | $9/month | 5-10 hrs/week |
| [[link:/tools/74|Copy.ai]] | Marketing copy | $36/month | 3-7 hrs/week |
| [[link:/tools/52|ClickUp AI]] | Project management | $7+/month | 2-5 hrs/week |
| [[link:/tools/51|VEED.io]] | Client video deliverables | $12+/month | 4-8 hrs/week |

---

## 1. Rytr (Best for Client Writing)

Write blog posts, emails, and proposals 10x faster!

---

## 2. Copy.ai (Best for Marketing Your Business)

Create social posts, website copy, and lead magnets to get more clients!

---

## 3. ClickUp AI (Best for Project Management)

Plan projects, generate meeting summaries, and keep clients updated automatically!

---

## 4. VEED.io (Best for Client Videos)

Create explainer videos, social reels, and client testimonials quickly!

---

## Our Final Tip

Start with 1-2 tools, master them, then add more as you scale!
